segment.source: Author: Noelia Ruiz Martínez, Ever Solis
segment.target: Author: Noelia Ruiz Martínez, Ever Solis

segment.source: This add-on is used to activate or deactivate profiles deppending on the state of browse mode.
segment.target: This add-on is used to activate or deactivate profiles deppending on the state of browse mode.

segment.source: Currently, when browse mode is active, a profile named browseMode will be activated, and it will be deactivated when browse mode becomes inactive.
segment.target: Currently, when browse mode is active, a profile named browseMode will be activated, and it will be deactivated when browse mode becomes inactive.

segment.source: The browseMode profile will be automatically created if it doesn't exist.
segment.target: The browseMode profile will be automatically created if it doesn't exist.
